title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!
